kwargs.content:
I need you to process the meter readings for tour J09B. Take all entries from the decision_table where the TOUR starts with "J09B" and put them into a temporary table called J09B_temp. Then add a new column called ENTSCHEIDUNG to that table.

For classifying each house: count how many equipment numbers (EQUNR) belong to each house (HAUS). If a house has fewer than 3 equipment numbers, set its ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA". Otherwise, set it to "EVU". There are four additional overrides that always result in "EVU": houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is 0, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 500 and 599, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 900 and 999, and houses located in the areas of Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld.

Next, enrich the data by joining it with the EABLG table using the INSTALLATION field, and also pull in customer contact details from both the net_master and sales_master tables using the EQUNR field. When both net and sales data exist for a customer, prefer the sales data and leave the net data fields empty. If only net data exists, keep that.

There is one more classification to handle: check the EABL table for equipment numbers that had "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" as ISTABLART_TXT in both 2023 and 2024 (based on Record created on). For those, set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING".

Export the MANDATORY_READING entries separately as a CSV file named "J09B_MANDATORY_READING" with these columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`. Send that file to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com.

Then export all remaining entries (everything except MANDATORY_READING) as a CSV file named "J09B" with the same columns. Send that to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com. After that, delete the temporary table.

args.sqlite_command:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_temp; CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT d.*, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS TITLE, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS FORENAME, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS SURNAME, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS STREET, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS STREETNO, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS EMAIL, CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) AS CONTACT_POST_CODE1, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS CONTACT_CITY1, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS CONTACT_CITY2 FROM decision_table d WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09B%';

UPDATE J09B_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE
  WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 THEN 'EVU'
  WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 THEN 'EVU'
  WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 THEN 'EVU'
  WHEN COALESCE(CITY1,'') LIKE '%Wiblingwerde%' OR COALESCE(CITY2,'') LIKE '%Wiblingwerde%' OR COALESCE(CITY1,'') LIKE '%Breckerfeld%' OR COALESCE(CITY2,'') LIKE '%Breckerfeld%' THEN 'EVU'
  WHEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t2.EQUNR) FROM J09B_temp t2 WHERE t2.HAUS = J09B_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA'
  ELSE 'EVU'
END;

UPDATE J09B_temp
SET "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = (
  SELECT e."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No."
  FROM eablg g
  JOIN eabl e ON e."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = g."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No."
  WHERE g.Installation = J09B_temp.ANLAGE
  ORDER BY COALESCE(e."Record created on", '') DESC, e."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." DESC
  LIMIT 1
);

UPDATE J09B_temp
SET TITLE = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.TITLE FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.TITLE FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END,
    FORENAME = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.FORENAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.FORENAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END,
    SURNAME = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.SURNAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.SURNAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END,
    STREET = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.STREET FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.STREET FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END,
    STREETNO = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.STREETNO FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.STREETNO FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END,
    EMAIL = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.EMAIL FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.EMAIL FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END,
    CONTACT_POST_CODE1 = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.POST_CODE1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.POST_CODE1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END,
    CONTACT_CITY1 = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.CITY1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.CITY1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END,
    CONTACT_CITY2 = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.CITY2 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.CITY2 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END;

UPDATE J09B_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'
WHERE EQUNR IN (
  SELECT EQUNR
  FROM eabl
  WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'
    AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY EQUNR
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2
);

args.sqlite_command: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'

CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT d.*, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS TITLE, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS FORENAME, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS SURNAME, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS STREET, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS STREETNO, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS EMAIL, CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) AS CONTACT_POST_CODE1, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS CONTACT_CITY1, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS CONTACT_CITY2 FROM decision_table d WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'

UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 THEN 'EVU' WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 THEN 'EVU' WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 THEN 'EVU' WHEN COALESCE(CITY1,'') LIKE '%Wiblingwerde%' OR COALESCE(CITY2,'') LIKE '%Wiblingwerde%' OR COALESCE(CITY1,'') LIKE '%Breckerfeld%' OR COALESCE(CITY2,'') LIKE '%Breckerfeld%' THEN 'EVU' WHEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t2.EQUNR) FROM J09B_temp t2 WHERE t2.HAUS = J09B_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END

UPDATE J09B_temp SET "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = ( SELECT e."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." FROM eablg g JOIN eabl e ON e."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = g."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." WHERE g.Installation = J09B_temp.ANLAGE ORDER BY COALESCE(e."Record created on", '') DESC, e."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." DESC LIMIT 1 )

UPDATE J09B_temp SET TITLE = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.TITLE FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.TITLE FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END, FORENAME = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.FORENAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.FORENAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END, SURNAME = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.SURNAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.SURNAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END, STREET = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.STREET FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.STREET FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END, STREETNO = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.STREETNO FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.STREETNO FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END, EMAIL = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.EMAIL FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.EMAIL FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END, CONTACT_POST_CODE1 = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.POST_CODE1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.POST_CODE1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END, CONTACT_CITY1 = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.CITY1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.CITY1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END, CONTACT_CITY2 = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.CITY2 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.CITY2 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END

UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN ( SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY EQUNR HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2 )

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, CONTACT_POST_CODE1 AS POST_CODE1, CONTACT_CITY1 AS CITY1, CONTACT_CITY2 AS CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, CONTACT_POST_CODE1 AS POST_CODE1, CONTACT_CITY1 AS CITY1, CONTACT_CITY2 AS CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG <> 'MANDATORY_READING' OR ENTSCHEIDUNG IS NULL
